traverse.description: throws IllegalArgumentException when visitor is null (Validate.notNull(visitor))
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = null; Node root = new Element(Tag.valueOf("div"), "");

traverse.description: throws IllegalArgumentException when root is null (Validate.notNull(root))
single-node tree invokes head and tail exactly once (no children)
traverse.precondition: visitor collects calls; root has no children
traverse.expectedResult: visitor.head called with root,depth=0; visitor.tail called with root,depth=0; traversal ends
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor logs head/tail; Node root = new TextNode("text");

traverse.description: two-level tree descends then ascends (one child), testing depth increment and tail after descend
traverse.precondition: root has one child; visitor logs sequence

traverse.description: tree with two siblings tests sibling next logic and multiple tail/ascend
traverse.precondition: root has two children A and B; visitor logs head/tail
traverse.expectedResult: calls: head(root,0), head(A,1), tail(A,1), head(B,1), tail(B,1), tail(root,0)

traverse.description: node removed in head triggers remove branch (origSize!=childNodeSize)
traverse.precondition: visitor.head removes current node; root has child; remove simulated via stub NodeVisitor
traverse.expectedResult: removed node not visited tail; remaining siblings/tails as expected
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor that calls node.remove() in head for text;
assert visitor.received head(root,0) and no tail(x); assert tail(root,0);

traverse.description: node replaced in head triggers replace branch (origSize==childNodeSize)
traverse.precondition: visitor.head replaces node with new TextNode; root has child; stub simulate replace
traverse.expectedResult: visitor traverses replacement node in place of original
pseudocode: Element root=new Element(Tag.valueOf("div"),""); TextNode child=new TextNode("old"); root.appendChild(child);
NodeVisitor visitor that in head calls child.replaceWith(new TextNode("new"));
assert visitor.calls include head(new,1) and tail(new,1);

traverse.description: empty Elements list yields no traversal
traverse.expectedResult: no calls to visitor.head or tail
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor logs calls; Elements elements = new Elements();

traverse.description: single Element in Elements calls traverse once (delegation)
traverse.precondition: Elements contains one Element with no children; visitor logs calls
traverse.expectedResult: visitor.head and tail called once for that element
pseudocode: Element el=new TextNode("t"); Elements elements = new Elements(el); NodeVisitor visitor logs calls;

traverse.description: multiple Elements stops only after iterating all elements
traverse.precondition: Elements contains two disconnected Element roots; visitor logs calls
pseudocode: Element a=new TextNode("a"), b=new TextNode("b"); Elements els=new Elements(a,b); NodeVisitor visitor logs calls;
